Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x841B "TRIAXOS-1000-841B" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Triaxos.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $1000 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Also patched the $01 at $234B to $0F to increase the music volume on the title screen (this bug exists in the original game - without this the music is too quiet).
